category_sources: Official GitHub README documents govulncheck for checking Go modules against vulnerability data.
source_facts.description says this provides database client and tools for the Go vulnerability database.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README installation command uses govulncheck.
docs_sources: Official repository README links to the official govulncheck tutorial and Go vulnerability management page.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already contains https://github.com/golang/vuln; per instruction repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: Official README references govulncheck, the tutorial, and Go vulnerability management docs.
source_facts.description identifies Go vulnerability database tooling.
